framework.name: Tool Count Threshold for Agent Performance
framework.description: Anecdotal evidence suggests agents perform optimally with 5-10 tools maximum. Beyond this threshold, agents make poor decisions about tool selection. This implies a cognitive load limit for LLM-based routing decisions.
framework.raw_quote: anecdotally we've seen that around 5 to 10 tools is the sweet spot for the maximum number of tools an agent should have
